message:
test(config): add DecisionLogConfig TOML integration tests (ft-3681t.6.1)

Add 3 tests ensuring SafetyConfig.decision_log works correctly with
TOML serialization:
- safety_config_decision_log_defaults: verify default values
- safety_config_decision_log_toml_roundtrip: serialize/deserialize roundtrip
- safety_config_missing_decision_log_uses_defaults: backwards compat with
  old TOML files that lack [safety.decision_log]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
